'''鈭歞h-v-sh''' ('''kadhavash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heave|heave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heave|heave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-v-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadhavash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhavash|thidhavash]] || [[word:jidhavash|jidhavash]] || [[word:shidhavash|shidhavash]] || [[word:kidhavash|kidhavash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhavash|thuthudhavash]] || [[word:jujudhavash|jujudhavash]] || [[word:shushudhavash|shushudhavash]] || [[word:kukudhavash|kukudhavash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhavash|thudhavash]] || [[word:judhavash|judhavash]] || [[word:shudhavash|shudhavash]] || [[word:kudhavash|kudhavash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhavash|thudhavash]] || [[word:judhavash|judhavash]] || [[word:shudhavash|shudhavash]] || [[word:kudhavash|kudhavash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhavash|thedhavash]] || [[word:jedhavash|jedhavash]] || [[word:shedhavash|shedhavash]] || [[word:kedhavash|kedhavash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhavash|thothodhavash]] || [[word:jojodhavash|jojodhavash]] || [[word:shoshodhavash|shoshodhavash]] || [[word:kokodhavash|kokodhavash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhavash|thodhavash]] || [[word:jodhavash|jodhavash]] || [[word:shodhavash|shodhavash]] || [[word:kodhavash|kodhavash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhavash|thodhavash]] || [[word:jodhavash|jodhavash]] || [[word:shodhavash|shodhavash]] || [[word:kodhavash|kodhavash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]] || [[word:dhavash|dhavash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhavash|th忙dhavash]] || [[word:j忙dhavash|j忙dhavash]] || [[word:sh忙dhavash|sh忙dhavash]] || [[word:k忙dhavash|k忙dhavash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhavash|thathadhavash]] || [[word:jajadhavash|jajadhavash]] || [[word:shashadhavash|shashadhavash]] || [[word:kakadhavash|kakadhavash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhavash|thadhavash]] || [[word:jadhavash|jadhavash]] || [[word:shadhavash|shadhavash]] || [[word:kadhavash|kadhavash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhavash|thadhavash]] || [[word:jadhavash|jadhavash]] || [[word:shadhavash|shadhavash]] || [[word:kadhavash|kadhavash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhavash|shadhavash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhavash|goshadhavash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhavash|gokishadhavash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhavashn眉|shadhavashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkn眉|goshadhavashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhavashn眉|gokishadhavashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhavashsh毛|shadhavashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhavashnksh毛|goshadhavashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhavashsh毛|gokishadhavashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhavashro|shadhavashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkro|goshadhavashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhavashro|gokishadhavashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhavashmu|shadhavashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkmu|goshadhavashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhavashmu|gokishadhavashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhavashsher|shadhavashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhavashnksher|goshadhavashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhavashsher|gokishadhavashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhavashng|shadhavashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkng|goshadhavashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhavashng|gokishadhavashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhavashya|shadhavashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkya|goshadhavashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhavashya|gokishadhavashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhavashyam|shadhavashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkyam|goshadhavashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhavashyam|gokishadhavashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhavashn眉sh毛|shadhavashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkn眉sh毛|goshadhavashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhavashn眉sh毛|gokishadhavashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhavashn眉ro|shadhavashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkn眉ro|goshadhavashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhavashn眉ro|gokishadhavashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhavashn眉mu|shadhavashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkn眉mu|goshadhavashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhavashn眉mu|gokishadhavashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhavashsh毛n眉|shadhavashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhavashnksh毛n眉|goshadhavashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhavashsh毛n眉|gokishadhavashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhavashsh毛ro|shadhavashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhavashnksh毛ro|goshadhavashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhavashsh毛ro|gokishadhavashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhavashsh毛mu|shadhavashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhavashnksh毛mu|goshadhavashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhavashsh毛mu|gokishadhavashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhavashron眉|shadhavashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkron眉|goshadhavashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhavashron眉|gokishadhavashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhavashrosh毛|shadhavashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkrosh毛|goshadhavashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhavashrosh毛|gokishadhavashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhavashromu|shadhavashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkromu|goshadhavashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhavashromu|gokishadhavashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhavashmun眉|shadhavashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkmun眉|goshadhavashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhavashmun眉|gokishadhavashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhavashmush毛|shadhavashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkmush毛|goshadhavashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhavashmush毛|gokishadhavashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhavashmuro|shadhavashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhavashnkmuro|goshadhavashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhavashmuro|gokishadhavashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
